Expert Care for Diabetes & Hormonal Health

Since 2007, Visakha Diabetes & Endocrine Centre has been the region's most trusted name in endocrinology — serving thousands of patients across Visakhapatnam with world-class diabetes management, hormonal care, and metabolic treatment under one roof.

Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

🎯

Our Vision

To be a trusted Centre of excellence in diabetes and endocrine care, delivering safe, ethical, and evidence-based healthcare with a strong focus on prevention, early diagnosis, and lifelong disease management.

🚀

Our Mission

To provide comprehensive, patient-centered care through accurate diagnosis, personalized treatment plans, and structured long-term management programs, supported by continuous monitoring, patient education, and a commitment to improving clinical outcomes and quality of life.

"Control Diabetes. Balance Hormones. Transform Life."

What We Offer

Comprehensive Speciality Services

Our expert team provides the full spectrum of diabetes and endocrine care using the latest technology and evidence-based medicine.

🩸

Diabetes Management

Comprehensive Type 1, Type 2 & gestational diabetes care with personalised treatment plans, HbA1c monitoring and lifestyle counselling.

🦋

Thyroid Disorders

Diagnosis and management of hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, Hashimoto's disease, thyroid nodules and thyroid cancers.

⚖️

Obesity & Metabolic Care

Evidence-based weight management, metabolic syndrome treatment and preventive strategies for cardiovascular risk reduction.

🧬

Hormonal Disorders

Evaluation and treatment of pituitary, adrenal, and reproductive hormone imbalances including PCOS and Cushing's syndrome.

🦶

Diabetic Foot Clinic

Specialised foot care, wound management and preventive treatment to reduce complications and amputations in diabetic patients.

💉

Insulin Pump Therapy

Advanced continuous glucose monitoring and insulin pump initiation, optimisation and ongoing support for better glycaemic control.

👶

Paediatric Endocrinology

Specialised care for children with growth disorders, puberty issues, childhood diabetes and congenital hormonal conditions.

🔬

Diagnostic Lab

In-house state-of-the-art laboratory for rapid, accurate hormonal panels, thyroid profiles, lipid screens and advanced metabolic tests.

🔭

Radiology Department

Ultrasound Abdomen, Doppler studies, Neck scanning and 2D Echo — providing precise imaging for faster, more accurate diagnosis.

📈

CGM — Continuous Glucose Monitoring

Real-time glucose tracking with CGM devices for better diabetes management, pattern analysis and personalised insulin adjustments.

🏠

Home Collection Services

Doorstep blood and sample collection for tests. Book your home visit by calling 9573099606.

🦶

Total Contact Casting (TCC)

Advanced Total Contact Casting for diabetic foot ulcers — the gold standard offloading technique to heal plantar wounds and prevent amputations.

🩹

Advanced Diabetic Foot Care

Comprehensive wound care, offloading, monofilament testing, vascular assessment and ulcer management by our specialist diabetic foot team.

100K+
Happy Patients

Stay Informed

Health Tips

Simple, effective tips from our specialists to help you manage your health better every day.

🩸

Monitor Blood Sugar Daily

Check your fasting and post-meal blood sugar regularly. Keep a log to share with your doctor during visits.

🥗

Follow a Balanced Diet

Avoid refined carbohydrates and sugary foods. Include fibre-rich vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins in every meal.

🚶

Stay Physically Active

A 30-minute walk daily improves insulin sensitivity and helps maintain healthy weight. Consistency is key.

💊

Never Skip Medication

Take prescribed medicines at the same time daily. Missing doses can cause sudden spikes in blood sugar or hormone levels.

😴

Prioritise Quality Sleep

Poor sleep disrupts hormones like cortisol and insulin. Aim for 7–8 hours of uninterrupted sleep every night.

📅

Regular Check-Ups Matter

Visit your endocrinologist every 3 months. Early detection of complications prevents serious long-term damage.

Dr. K.A.V. Subrahmanyam

Professor & HOD — Endocrinology
Andhra Medical College & King George Hospital, Visakhapatnam
MD (General Medicine) · DM (Endocrinology)

Education & Qualifications

MD — General Medicine Andhra Medical College, Visakhapatnam
DM — Endocrinology PGIMER, Chandigarh (Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education & Research)
Training — Diabetes Epidemiology Organized at Hong Kong under the auspices of WHO (World Health Organization)
Training — Fertility Procedures (Male & Female) Family Welfare Institute, New Delhi

Professional Experience

🏥

Currently serving as Professor & Head of Department, Endocrinology at Andhra Medical College & King George Hospital, Visakhapatnam.

🌿

Previously served at a Primary Health Centre, providing grassroots-level healthcare to communities.

🩺

Served as Leprosy Medical Officer, demonstrating commitment to public health and disease management.

Research & Community Programmes

📊

Organized Diabetic Prevalence Programs in and around Visakhapatnam, contributing to the understanding of diabetes in the regional community.

🦋

Currently leading a Thyroid Survey Programme and developing a Thyroid Risk Index to identify patients with thyroid diseases within the community.

Memberships
